title: ophrys umbilicata subsp. flavomarginata
intro: Ophrys umbilicata subsp. flavomarginata, also known as the Yellow-fringed Spurred Orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is believed to have medicinal properties due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The health benefits of this plant are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although these claims are also largely anecdotal. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Ophrys umbilicata subsp. flavomarginata have been used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
